titleStmt.title: SII 16.122: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 122. (A.R. No. 302 of 1905.) PUSHPAGIRI, CUDDAPAH TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up at the southern gōpura, right of entrance of the Vaidyanātha svāmin temple.

The record is dated Śaka 1462, Śārvari, Āśvayuja śu. 15, Thursday. If the month is adhika-Aśvayuja, the details regularly correspond to 1540 A.D., September 16, Thursday °25, when there occured a lunar eclipse. Otherwise the date would correspond to 1540 A.D., October 14, Thursday f.d.t. °82.

Records that Daḷavāyi Timmarusayya, son of Sōmarusayya of Chandragiri and Kāḷamamma represented to the king that Pushpagiri, situated in the Ghaṇḍikōṭa-sīma at the confluence of the five rivers considered sacred as the Vāraṇāsi of the south, and was obtained the royal assent to remit the durgadaṇāyanivarttana, the beḍige and other minor taxes that were being collected from the village formerly to the mahājanas of the agrahāra for the merit of the king and for that of his own parents. The donor is said to have obtained Ghaṇḍikōṭa-sīma as nāyaṅkara from the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivā The right side of the stone is slightly broken.
śakavarṣaṁbulu 1462 Agunēṭi śārvari saṁ
Āśvīja śu 15 gu śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara
pratāpa Acyutadēvamahārāyalu vijayanagara
vajrasiṁhāsanārūḍhuḍai pṛthvirājyaṁ cēyucuṁḍa
dyajanādi ṣaṭkarmaniratulaina puṣpagiri Agrahāra sthitā
vidvanmahājanālakuṁnnu caṁdragiri sōmarusayya putṛḍu
Acyutadēvamahārāyala daḷavāI timmarusayyaṁvā
Icina sarvamānyapu dharmaśāsana kramameṭlannanu svāmi
cyutadēvamahārāyalu māku nāyaṁkarānaku pāli
cina ghaṁḍikōṭa śīmalōni mī puṣpagiri Agrahāramaṁ
pūrvāna naḍacina ghaṁḍikōṭadurgādhipatulu kone Aṭu
vaṁṭi durgadaṇāyanivartana cilara nānāvagala konaṭi be
ḍigeluṁnu nēmu mī puṣpagiristhaḷaṁ bhāskarakṣētraṁ paṁcanadī saṁ
gamaṁ dakṣiṇavāraṇāsi viśēṣasthaḷaṁ Ani mā svāmi Acyutadēvamahā
rāyalaku vinnaṁpaṁ cēśi svāmi Ānatini mā svāmi Acyu
ta dēvamahārāyalaku puṇyaṁgānuṁnnu mā taṁḍri
sōmaruyyavārikiṁnni mā talli kāḷamaṁmmavāri
kiṁnni puṁṇyaṁgānu Ī tathātithi puṁṇyakālamaṁdu virupā
kṣaviṭhalēsvaradēvuni saṁnithini tuṁgabhadrātīramaṁdu pu
ṣpagiri Agrahāraṁ Aṁdula grāmagrāsaṁ gōṭūru mōdalu
gānu ghaṁḍikōṭadurgānaku Acivace rokhaṁ Aṁttavaṭuṁnnu
ghaṁḍikōṭasthalamaṁde vahiśudhi cēIṁci sarvamānyaṁgānu
puṣpagiri Agrahāraṁ mahājanālaku trivācakaṁgānu
dhāravōśi Istimi Ī dharmānaku muṁdaranaḍacē durgādhi
patulu kānikakaṭlelu tapikonirā tama tallitaṁḍrini kāśi
lō vadhiṁcina pāpāna sōĒvāru gaṁgakarta gōbrāṁhmala va
dhiṁcina pāpāna pōĒvāru Iṭani Icina dharmaśāsanaṁ . svadattā
dviguṇaṁ puṁṇyaṁ paradattānupālanaṁ . paradattāpahārē
ṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēt . dānapālanayōrmadhyē dānācchrēyōnu
pālanaṁ . dānā tsvargamavāpnōti pālanā dacyutaṁ padaṁ . svada
ttāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēta vasuṁdharā[ṁ .*] ṣaṣṭirvarṣasahasrāṇi
viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi[ḥ .] vopaṁ śrīgirimallikhārjunā maṁgaḷa
mahāśrīśrījēyunu śrī .
Digital edition of SII 16.122 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
